$comment: Psychage Mobile Design Tokens. Authored Phase 4.B for apps/mobile (Phase 6 scaffold). No source codebase to extract from — values are constructive per locked Phase 4.B decisions. Color values copied verbatim from tokens/web.tokens.json for cross-platform identity coherence (DESIGN.mobile.md §6). Mobile-only families: haptic.*, audio.*, motion.duration.breath. Typography size scale + spacing scale are skeleton stubs, calibrated against first mobile screen in Phase 6.

_meta.citationConvention: _source-sibling-object per leaf group (matches web schema). For mobile values copied from web, _source cites the web token leaf rather than a source-file path.

_source._note: Values verbatim from tokens/web.tokens.json color.surface.* — cross-platform identity (DESIGN.mobile.md §6). 'hover' state has no native-touch analog; consume on long-press / focused states.
Brand teal expression. Values verbatim from tokens/web.tokens.json color.primary.*.
Values verbatim from tokens/web.tokens.json color.text.*. text.tertiary.light floors at WCAG AA 5.2:1 — do not lighten without re-checking.

crisis._note: Non-themed (single value). Crisis surfaces must visually announce regardless of mode.

_source._note: Values verbatim from tokens/web.tokens.json color.relevance.*. Symptom-Navigator relevance shading.
Sparse brand teal scale verbatim from tokens/web.tokens.json color.teal.*. Hardcoded — does not theme with mode.
11-step non-themed neutral scale verbatim from tokens/web.tokens.json color.charcoal.*. Coexists with color.text.* (themed) per DESIGN.web.md §7 Q7 — same rule applies on mobile.

Values verbatim from tokens/web.tokens.json color.mood.*. 5-step ordinal mood palette shared cross-platform for mood-feature consistency. Labels (consumer-side, not token): 1=Awful, 2=Low, 3=Okay, 4=Good, 5=Great.

DD-001 typography lock (2026-06-10): sans/body/UI = IBM Plex Sans (SIL OFL), display/headlines = Fraunces (SIL OFL). Both bundled as static cuts via @expo-google-fonts/ibm-plex-sans (400/500/700) + @expo-google-fonts/fraunces (600), registered through expo-font useFonts in apps/mobile/app/_layout.tsx. Family strings are the expo-google-fonts export names; NativeWind font-sans/font-display resolve through these values (apps/mobile/tailwind.config.js). The mono family token was dropped (no production use — only the dev-navigator verification screen referenced it, now points at the platform default monospace). The previously bundled brand typeface was removed and is forbidden in the mobile bundle — its Indian Type Foundry / Fontshare EULA does not clearly cover embedding the font binary in a distributed app (see DD-001 / DESIGN.mobile.md §1.2). Cross-platform note: web typography (tokens/web.tokens.json type.family.*) is independent — web keeps Inter / Plus Jakarta Sans / IBM Plex Mono; this divergence is intentional, not drift.

_omitted._note: size/weight/leading/tracking omitted in V1 — psychage-mobile has no shipped screen to calibrate against. Skeleton stubs only. Calibrated against the first mobile screen design in Phase 6. Hardcoding a scale before there is a screen to validate it is invented value (see DESIGN.mobile.md §1.2).

Omitted in V1 — psychage-mobile has no shipped screen to calibrate against. 8pt grid is the locked baseline per DESIGN.mobile.md §1.3 (iOS HIG / Material default). Specific steps (4, 8, 12, 16, 24, 32, etc.) authored against the first mobile screen design in Phase 6. Hardcoding a scale before there is a screen is invented value.

_canonical._note: Mobile uses 3 steps vs web's 5. Mobile drops sm/md (negligible visual delta at typical mobile sizes) and 2xl/3xl emphasis tier (mobile emphasis leans on sensorial dimensions per DESIGN.mobile.md §1.4). Card/surface radius = xl matches web (DESIGN.web.md §1.4).

_source._note: ms integers (Reanimated v4 convention). swift=utility tap/toggle/select; base=utility modal/page/reveal; calm=content tool-intros/celebrations; breath=content guided-breath cycle (natural breath ~4s). See DESIGN.mobile.md §3.1.

Cubic-bezier control-point strings (Reanimated v4 accepts strings; can be parsed to array form if needed). 'breath' is symmetric ease-in-out for breath-cycle parity. 'standard' adapted from Material in-place transitions; differs from web standard [0.4, 0, 0.2, 1] (DESIGN.web.md motion.easing.standard) — mobile in-place lean is sharper. Documented divergence.

breath._note: When OS prefers-reduced-motion is on, breath animations are static. Users who want breath motion despite OS setting can enable the in-app toggle. See DESIGN.mobile.md §3.1.

_reducedMotion._note: Two-tier handling. Non-essential motion (decorative loops, ambient pulsing) fully disabled. Essential motion (modal/tab/feedback) replaces transform/scale with 200ms cross-fade — hierarchy still communicates, vestibular trigger removed. Breath gets its own override with in-app opt-back-in.

affirm._use: primary CTAs, mood submit, tool start

breath_in._use: breathing inhale; ~800ms total; loops with motion.duration.breath at 4s/cycle

breath_out._use: breathing exhale; inverse curve of breath_in

_OSRespect._note: iOS System Haptics toggle: expo-haptics no-ops automatically when off; verify in QA. Low Power Mode: expo-haptics no-ops automatically; verify. In-app toggle: REQUIRED in avatar → accessibility sheet — some users want app haptics off without disabling system haptics globally.

_noHapticZones: error states (use warm copy + visual; no haptic.error token exists — would read as punitive against brand voice)
high-frequency micro-interactions (typing keystrokes, slider drag deltas, scroll velocity) — aggregated end-of-gesture acceptable, per-event not
background notifications (OS notification haptic owns this surface, not in-app code)
haptic._implementationNote: Sequenced patterns (complete, breath_in, breath_out) implemented via chained setTimeout(() => Haptics.*(), delayMs). JS-thread timing is approximate (~10–20ms drift). Core Haptics AHAP patterns via a native module would deliver higher fidelity for breath-cycle parity; tracked as V1.1 candidate (DESIGN.mobile.md §8).

audio._v1: empty — content audio only, no UI sound effects, no tap sounds, no in-app notification chimes. Content (Dr. Dobson videos, future guided-breathing recordings) brings its own audio.
_v2Candidates: audio.complete — soft milestone chime, default-off in settings
_v2Gates: signature-moment audit confirms content-only restraint failed
Dr. Dobson clinical sign-off on chime designs (anxious/migraine-overlap audience)
Reduce Audio system setting honored at firing site

_colorDeferred.iconTealDot: teal role — one teal dot per pictogram, tokenized so night can swap it
_colorDeferred._reason: Palette unratified — the Wave A1 order's warm 'LOCKED DESIGN SYSTEM' hexes (clay/ink/ink-2/teal-deep) are absent from the repo and differ from the existing cool color.* palette; even the order's mood hexes differ from color.mood.*. Color bindings deferred pending a design-owner decision; authored in Order 2 once the palette is ratified.

_source._note: Bottom tab bar geometry, 4 tabs. Active = pressed treatment (inset shadow + press-bg); inactive = flat; label always visible. GIVEN (Wave A1 order): tabCount 4, icon.size 24, label.size 11 (IBM Plex Sans → type.family.sans), minTarget 44 floor, one teal dot per pictogram. DERIVED (flagged for design ratification): barHeight 56 (iOS HIG tab bar 49pt + label band, rounded onto the 8pt-grid baseline; clears the 44 target + 11/14 label); label.lineHeight 14 (~1.27x of 11, compact-UI ratio); activePill.radius reuses canonical radius.lg (sub-component pill < card 'xl'; 'full' would over-round a wide tab cell); insetShadow geometry {offsetY 1, blur 2, opacity 0.12, inset} — conservative recessed read. Label weight is carried by the family token (sans = 400 cut); no numeric weight scale exists.
_source._implementationNote: React Native has no portable native inset box-shadow — render the recessed active pill via a Skia inner-shadow or a layered overlay; verify in QA.
_source._calibrationFlag: Font-size 11 and dp literals (24/44/56) precede the intentionally-stubbed type/spacing scales (type._omitted, spacing._omitted) — recalibrate against the first tab-bar screen.

connectingLine._rule: drawn ONLY between two consecutive entries; any gap (missing day) breaks the line

geometry._note: fraction of row height measured from the top; baseline = bottom band, midline = vertical center

_colorDeferred.dotRing: border-strong role — the 1px ring is load-bearing (the 'okay' mood tint fails 3:1 alone; the ring rescues contrast)
_colorDeferred.label: ink-3 role (de-emphasized axis labels)
_colorDeferred.moodTint: intended state->mood mapping {0->mood.1, 1->mood.2, 2->mood.3, 3->mood.4, 4->mood.5}; order says reference existing color.mood.* (do NOT duplicate) — but the mood palette itself is unratified (order's mood hexes differ from the file's color.mood.*), so the binding is deferred
_colorDeferred._reason: Palette unratified (see tabBar._colorDeferred). Order 2 resolves color bindings.

_source._note: Record (terrain) visualization geometry — component-only. GIVEN (Wave A1 order): dot.radius 6.5 with a 1px ring (load-bearing contrast rescue), noEntryDot.radius 4 (hollow) at baseline, todayDot.radius 8 (dashed open circle) at midline, connectingLine only between consecutive entries, label.size 11, fillByState 12/32/52/74/95 for states 0-4. DERIVED (flagged): atFraction 0.5 = midline and baselineFraction 0.95 = bottom band (verbal anchors expressed as resolution-independent row-height fractions, since no spacing scale exists); todayDot.stroke {width 1.5, dash [3,3]} renders the 'dashed open circle'; connectingLine.width 1 (hairline); label.lineHeight 14.
_source._calibrationFlag: radii 6.5/4/8, fills 12-95 and label-size 11 are literals predating the stubbed type/spacing scales — recalibrate against the first terrain screen.
_source._scope: record-terrain-feature-only — mood tints (deferred) reference color.mood.* (mood-feature-scoped) and inherit that scope restriction.

_source._note: A 'reflection-ready' ROW (not a banner). GIVEN (Wave A1 order): dot.radius 7, text.size 14 weight 500 (the 500 cut -> type.family.sansMedium; deliberately NOT the Fraunces display register — this announces an artifact, not something the app says about the person), chevron present, minTarget 44. DERIVED (flagged): rowHeight 44 (single-line row set to the target floor); text.lineHeight 20 (~1.43x of 14); chevron.size 20 (passive disclosure glyph < the 24 tab icon); gap 8/8 (8pt-grid baseline).
_source._calibrationFlag: Sizes 14/20/7 and dp literals 44/8 precede the stubbed type/spacing scales — recalibration candidates.

_source._note: History continuum trailing-edge month rail. GIVEN (Wave A1 order): columnWidth 36, cap labels Plex 10.5 weight 600, sits behind a hairline, jump minTarget 44 tall. DERIVED (flagged): hairline.width 1; capLabel.lineHeight 14 (compact cap ratio in a 36-wide column).
_source._weightNote: weightIntent 600 has NO bundled font cut — DD-001 ships IBM Plex Sans 400/500/700 only (Fraunces 600 is a serif, wrong for caps). Kept as a literal spec-intent field (NOT a usable family string). Resolve in Phase 6: render-map to type.family.sansBold (700), or bundle @expo-google-fonts/ibm-plex-sans 600.
_source._calibrationFlag: Size 10.5 and dp literals 36/44 precede the stubbed type/spacing scales — recalibrate; resolve the 600 cut in Phase 6.

_source._note: Note marker on the continuum — says ONLY that a note exists. GIVEN (Wave A1 order): strokeLength 6 (vertical stroke), strokeWidth 1.5, rounded caps (lineCap 'round'), positioned in a fixed lane 4dp below the dot baseline at the noted day's x. Never under the dot (would collide with low states and fake a second data channel).
_source._geometryNote: x = the noted day's column x (shared with terrain.dot x); y top = terrain.geometry.baselineFraction + laneOffsetBelowDotBaseline. Renders as a 6dp vertical line, 1.5dp wide, round caps.
_source._calibrationFlag: dp literals 6/1.5/4 precede the stubbed spacing scale — recalibration candidates.

_colorDeferred.label: clay role (clay-dash label)
_colorDeferred._reason: Palette unratified (see tabBar._colorDeferred). 'clay' has no existing token; binding deferred.

_source._note: Sync-loading skeleton for the terrain. GIVEN (Wave A1 order): clay-filled dots radius 6.5, NO ring (ring false), at midline (atFraction 0.5), NO connecting thread (connectingLine false), clay-dash labels, STATIC. Deliberately unlike the entry glyph (tinted + ringed, at height) and the no-entry glyph (hollow, at baseline) so loading can never be misread as data or as absence. DERIVED (flagged): label.size 11 (terrain parity); label.lineHeight 14.
_source._motionNote: shimmer:false is asserted at the token level — a shimmer would be a fifth motion verb; the motion vocabulary is closed at four (swift/base/calm/breath). Do not add animation.
_source._calibrationFlag: radius 6.5 and label-size 11 precede the stubbed type/spacing scales — recalibration candidates.
